notes: No reconciliation artifact existed for this chunk, so the work was treated as greenfield.
The implemented subset is limited to ACK freshness and PATH_CHALLENGE payload uniqueness; the remaining S13P3 requirements stay blocked until a sender/recovery architecture exists.
The gap ledger was updated to record the architectural split explicitly.
